decks.notes: The Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with efficient creatures like Gilded Goose, Prosperous Innkeeper, and Trelasarra, Moon Dancer while using cards like Collected Company to refill the board. It also utilizes powerful synergies such as Haliya, Guided by Light and Enduring Innocence to maintain pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Dromoka's Command and creatures like Virulent Emissary to control the opponent's board. With a mix of aggro creatures, powerful synergies, and disruptive elements, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly.

The deck focuses on utilizing the combo between Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful synergy. It includes cards to support and protect the combo, such as Monument to Endurance and Fatal Push. The deck also includes disruption and removal spells like Thoughtseize and Vanishing Verse to control the game and ensure the combo goes off successfully. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's strategy and enable the combo to be executed efficiently.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures like Cori-Steel Cutter, Emberheart Challenger, and Monastery Swiftspear to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. The deck includes cards like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to remove threats or clear the way for attacks. Stormchaser's Talent and Soul-Scar Mage can pump up the damage output of the creatures, while Experimental Synthesizer can provide additional card advantage. The goal of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with early aggressive threats and finish them off before they have time to stabilize.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low-cost creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to control the board early on with cards like Soul-Scar Mage and Cori-Steel Cutter, while using cards like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to deal direct damage and remove threats. By applying pressure early and forcing the opponent to react, the deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The deck's fast pace and aggressive strategy make it a formidable opponent in Pioneer 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on utilizing a variety of cards with different abilities to create powerful combos that can overwhelm the opponent. The main strategy involves using Tinybones Joins Up and Nashi, Searcher in the Dark to generate card advantage while controlling the board with creatures like Rona, Herald of Invasion and Carnage, Crimson Chaos. Additional support comes from cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Eddie Brock to further enhance the deck's combo potential. The deck also includes a mix of lands and mana sources to ensure smooth gameplay and consistency in executing the combos.

The primary focus of this deck is to assemble the Greasefang Parhelion combo by utilizing cards such as Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II. The deck includes support cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to control the game and protect the combo pieces. Monument to Endurance helps to keep the combo pieces on the battlefield, while cards like Lively Dirge and Vanishing Verse offer removal options. The deck also includes mana fixing lands and creatures like Iron-Shield Elf to support the combo strategy and ensure its success in the match.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, along with hand disruption like Thoughtseize and Duress. It also utilizes mana dorks such as Llanowar Elves to ramp into powerful threats like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Ouroboroid. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while establishing a board presence with creatures like Sentinel of the Nameless City. Additionally, the deck includes utility lands like Boseiju, Who Endures and Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth to further enhance its control capabilities.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a variety of counterspells, removal cards, and card draw effects to outvalue the opponent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain board control until it can win the game through incremental advantage. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion adds an additional threat to the deck while the diverse land base allows for flexibility in casting spells. Overall, the key concept of this UW Control deck is to outlast the opponent and win through superior resource management and card advantage.

The main focus of the deck is to quickly deploy low-cost aggressive creatures with prowess abilities, while utilizing burn spells and card draw to control the board and push through damage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient aggressive strategy, using cards like Monastery Swiftspear, Soul-Scar Mage, and Stormchaser's Talent to apply pressure early on. By combining creatures with burn spells and card draw, the deck can maintain a steady stream of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Greasefang Parhelion combo to create a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes cards that help ramp up mana quickly, control the opponent's hand with cards like Thoughtseize, and generate tokens to go wide. The key strategy is to assemble the Greasefang Parhelion combo as quickly as possible to generate a powerful army of creatures and finish the game quickly.

The main idea behind this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. By utilizing efficient creatures like Archon of Emeria, Skyclave Apparition, and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, along with mana ramp from Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence quickly. Collected Company allows for additional creature deployment, while cards like Enduring Innocence and Michelangelo's Technique provide removal and combat tricks. The deck also includes a mix of land cards to ensure consistent mana production and smooth gameplay.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Greasefang Parhelion combo to overwhelm opponents by generating a large number of tokens and gaining advantage through sacrificing them. The deck includes cards to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The goal is to control the board with a mixture of removal, protection, and card advantage while setting up the combo for a game-winning play. The key strategy is to efficiently assemble the combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan to secure victory.

This deck focuses on playing efficient and aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Brightglass Gearhulk to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing mana acceleration from Elvish Mystic and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to play powerful threats such as Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines and Craterhoof Behemoth. The inclusion of disruptive spells like Seam Rip and Soul-Guide Lantern helps to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is optimized for consistent and fast plays, with a mix of lands that provide colored mana and utility.

The deck focuses on controlling the game using a variety of removal spells and versatile creatures. The key strategy is to ramp up mana using cards like Bring to Light and Sylvan Caryatid to play powerful multicolored threats like Niv-Mizzet Reborn and Omnath, Locus of Creation. The inclusion of Leyline Binding and Ancient Cornucopia helps to stabilize the board and gain card advantage. The deck also utilizes a companion, Yorion, Sky Nomad, to provide additional value and synergy with its flicker ability. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver opponents through efficient control tactics.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful recurring threat. It includes cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize for disruption, Monument to Endurance for recursion, and Guardian of New Benalia for additional value. The mana base is built to support the combo pieces with a mix of lands like Godless Shrine and The Mycosynth Gardens. Vanishing Verse provides removal, while Fleeting Spirit and Iron-Shield Elf offer additional support. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful synergies.

This deck focuses on utilizing Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana in order to combo off and win the game quickly. The main strategy involves ramping up mana with cards like Arboreal Grazer and Scapeshift to maximize the potential of Lotus Field. Lumra, Bellow of the Woods and The Wandering Minstrel help to dig for combo pieces, while cards like Boseiju, Who Endures provide protection for key spells. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.
